Demurreer To Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-30-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Sunena Sabharwal, Esq. 510/466-6090 for pltf & opposing party; John Phillips, Esq. 835-1627 for deft & moving party United Parcel Service and John Hyland; Kathryn C. Curry, Esq. 650/364-8200 for deft & moving party Liberty Mutual Fire Insurance Company.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as to the 1st cause of action; adopted as to the 2nd cause of action except as to deft Liberty-sustained with leave to amend; adopted as to the 3rd cause of action; & in addition, pltf can attempt to plead negligence against Liberty. 15 days to amend. Mr. Phillips to prepare order.
